lines.raw: Lesson 95 | 第95课
Tickets, please. | 请出示车票。

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Why did George and Ken miss the train?
lines.chinese: 乔治和肯为什么误了火车？
lines.raw: Why did George and Ken miss the train? | 乔治和肯为什么误了火车？

lines.english: Two return tickets to London, please.
lines.chinese: 请给我两张到伦敦的往返票。
lines.raw: Two return tickets to London, please. | 请给我两张到伦敦的往返票。

lines.english: What time will the next train leave?
lines.chinese: 下一班火车什么时候开？
lines.raw: What time will the next train leave? | 下一班火车什么时候开？
At nineteen minutes past eight. | 八点十九分。
Which platform? | 哪个站台？
Platform Two. | 二号站台。
Over the bridge. | 从天桥过去。

lines.english: What time will the next train leave?
lines.chinese: 下一班火车什么时候开？
lines.raw: What time will the next train leave? | 下一班火车什么时候开？
At eight nineteen. | 八点十九分。
We've got plenty of time. | 我们时间很充裕。

lines.english: It's only three minutes to eight.
lines.raw: It's only three minutes to eight. | 现在才差三分钟八点。

lines.english: Let's go and have a drink.
lines.raw: Let's go and have a drink. | 我们去喝一杯吧。

lines.english: There's a bar next door to the station.
lines.raw: There's a bar next door to the station. | 车站旁边有个酒吧。

lines.english: We had better go back to the station now, Ken.
lines.chinese: 肯，我们现在最好回车站了。
lines.raw: We had better go back to the station now, Ken. | 肯，我们现在最好回车站了。
Tickets, please. | 请出示车票。

lines.english: We want to catch the eight nineteen to London.
lines.chinese: 我们想乘八点十九分去伦敦的火车。
lines.raw: We want to catch the eight nineteen to London. | 我们想乘八点十九分去伦敦的火车。
You've just missed it! | 你们刚错过了！
What! | 什么！
It's only eight fifteen. | 现在才八点十五分。
I'm sorry, sir. | 对不起，先生。
That clock's ten minutes slow. | 那个钟慢了十分钟。

lines.chinese: 下一班火车什么时候开？
lines.raw: When's the next train? | 下一班火车什么时候开？
In five hours' time! | 五个小时以后！
